items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. You can cancel your Pro or Enterprise plan at any time from your dashboard settings. No hidden fees or penalties.

items.q: Is my insurance policy data safe?
items.a: Your PDF is encrypted during upload (256-bit TLS), processed by our AI, and then permanently deleted. We only store the analysis report, never your original document.

items.q: What types of insurance policies can you scan?
items.a: We support all major Indian insurance types: Health, Term Life, Motor (Car & Bike), Home, Travel, and Business insurance â€” from all IRDAI-registered insurers.
Yes. If our AI finds no additional risks beyond the free preview, we offer a 100% refund within 7 days of purchase. Just email us at support@insuranceclarity.in.

items.q: Is there a free trial for Pro?
items.a: The Free plan gives you 2 full AI scans per month to evaluate our product. Each scan report's first 3 risks are shown free â€” no credit card required.

suggestions: How do I check my claim settlement ratio?
What is not covered in my health insurance?
How much life insurance do I need?

calculator.title: Smart Premium Advisor
calculator.subtitle: Get a high-precision estimate powered by advanced actuarial modeling.

fields.policyTermTooltip: Longer terms (20-40 years) lock in lower rates and offer better long-term value.
fields.smokingTooltip: Smoking increases premium rates by up to 50% due to higher health risks.

tips.title: Premium Optimization Tips
tips.buyEarlyDescription: For every year you wait after 30, your premium increases by approx 4-7%.
tips.annualPaymentsDescription: Choosing yearly instead of monthly payments can save up to 8% in processing fees.

hlv.title: How Much Are You Worth?
hlv.subtitle: Calculated naturally. Find out exactly how much life insurance your family needs to maintain their lifestyle if you aren't around.
hlv.personalExpensesHint: Typically 20-35% of income goes to your personal travel, food, etc.
hlv.signInHint: Registered users can track HLV changes over time and get direct advisor checks.
hlv.insightRule: The 10x Rule is often insufficient in India due to high education inflation (10-12%).
hlv.insightRevisit: Your HLV should ideally be revisited every 5 years or after major life events like child birth or home loans.

taxBenefit.title: Old vs New Tax Check
taxBenefit.subtitle: See how your insurance premiums affect your tax liability under Section 80C and 80D. Find your perfect regime.
taxBenefit.newRegimeNote: In New Regime, your insurance premiums (â‚¹{amount}) have zero impact on tax.
taxBenefit.oldRegimeSaving: In Old Regime, you are currently saving â‚¹{min} to â‚¹{max} in taxes just through insurance.
taxBenefit.budgetNote: Budget 2024 increased New Regime slabs. If your income is above 15L and you have less than 4.5L in total deductions, New Regime is usually better.

roomRent.title: The Room Rent Trap
roomRent.subtitle: Did you know? Choosing a room above your policy limit can reduce your entire hospital bill by the same percentage. Use this tool to visualize the loss.
roomRent.proportionateDesc: If you occupy a room more expensive than your limit, the insurer assumes you can afford better surgery too. They then cut payables for doctors, operation theater, and tests by the same ratio.
roomRent.suggestion1Desc: Always opt for plans like HDFC Ergo Optima Secure or Care Supreme that have no capping on room rent.
roomRent.suggestion2Desc: If your policy says 'Single Private Room', you are safe as long as you don't pick a Suite or Deluxe.

hiddenFacts.title: What Insurance Companies Don't Tell You
hiddenFacts.subtitle: Discover 150+ hidden exclusions, fine print clauses, and real claim rejection cases.
hiddenFacts.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any facts matching your search. Try adjusting your filters.

claimCases.title: Real Insurance Claim Cases

claimCases.emptyDescriptionFallback: The claim library could not be loaded right now. You can still explore Hidden Facts while the case feed recovers.

hero.subtitle: Search 1,000+ past insurance claims, ombudsman rulings, and consumer court decisions to see why claims get rejected and how to stay protected.

search.placeholder: Search for keywords like 'Cataract', 'Drink & Drive', 'Heart Bypass'...

empty.title: No cases found
empty.description: Try searching for broader terms or changing categories.

ombudsman.a: A neutral mediator between you and the insurer for claims up to Rs 30 Lakhs.

rejectedVsRepudiated.a: Rejected is a temporary bar for missing docs; Repudiated is a flat 'No' based on policy terms.

appealAfterTwoYears.a: Yes, but you usually have to explain the delay to the courts or ombudsman.

about.title: About
about.heroDesc: We're an independent educational platform with a simple mission: make insurance understandable for every Indian. No sales, no commissions, no jargon â€” just the truth about your policies.
about.missionP1: Insurance in India is complex by design. Policies run dozens of pages. Exclusions are buried in footnotes. Premiums are pushed by commission-driven agents. And millions of Indians discover the gaps in their coverage only at claim time â€” when it's too late.
about.missionP2: InsuranceClarity was born from frustration with this opacity. We believed there should be a platform that tells you what insurance companies don't want you to know â€” before you sign anything. So we built one.
about.missionP3: We decode policy documents, surface hidden exclusions, track real claim outcomes, and provide tools that help you compare policies on dimensions that actually matter for claims.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: We expose what insurance companies hide â€” exclusions, sub-limits, waiting periods, and conditions that affect claims.

zeroBias.title: Zero Commission Bias
zeroBias.desc: We do not receive commissions from insurers. Our analysis is purely data-driven and consumer-focused.

consumerFirst.title: Consumer First
consumerFirst.desc: Our loyalty is to policyholders, not insurers. We advocate for fair treatment and informed choices.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven
dataDriven.desc: All claims data and CSR figures are sourced from official IRDAI annual reports. We cite our sources.

about.disclaimerText: InsuranceClarity India is an educational content platform and is not an IRDAI-licensed insurance intermediary, broker, or agent. We do not sell, solicit, or negotiate insurance products. All content is for informational purposes only. Insurance is subject to IRDAI regulations. Please read all policy documents carefully and consult a licensed advisor before purchasing.

metadata.title: Cookie Policy | InsuranceClarity India
metadata.description: Cookie Policy for InsuranceClarity India - How we use cookies and how to manage your preferences.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit websites. They help websites remember your preferences and track usage patterns. Cookies cannot access other data on your device or harm your computer.

essential.title: Essential Cookies (No Consent Required)
essential.description: These are necessary for the website to function:

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies (Requires Consent)
analytics.description: These help us understand how you use the website:

advertising.title: Advertising Cookies
advertising.boldLead: We do NOT use advertising cookies.
advertising.description: We do not display targeted ads or use any advertising networks (Meta Pixel, Google Ads, etc.).

bannerOption.title: Option 1: Cookie Banner (First Visit)
bannerOption.description: When you first visit, a cookie banner appears with options to:

browserSettings.title: Option 2: Browser Settings
browserSettings.description: You can control cookies in your browser:
browserSettings.note: Note: Disabling essential cookies may break website functionality.

optOut.title: Option 3: Opt-Out of Analytics
optOut.descriptionPrefix: You can exclude yourself from GA4 tracking by installing the

notEmbedded.socialPixels: Social media tracking pixels (Meta Pixel, Twitter Pixel, etc.)
notEmbedded.adNetworks: Advertising networks (Google Ads, Facebook Ads, etc.)

onlyTrackers.ga4: Google Analytics 4 (marketing analytics, with PII blocking enabled)
onlyTrackers.posthog: PostHog (product analytics, enabled only when configured and consented)

items.piiBlocking: PII Blocking: We block age, email, phone, and other sensitive fields from analytics cookies
items.ipAnonymization: IP Anonymization: Last octet of IP address is removed before analytics processing
items.dataMinimization: Data Minimization: We only track non-identifying, aggregated usage patterns
items.secureTransmission: Secure Transmission: All cookies are transmitted over HTTPS only

changes.title: 6. Changes to This Cookie Policy
changes.description: We may update this policy to reflect new cookies or service providers. Changes will be posted here with an updated ?Last modified? date. If we add new analytics or tracking cookies, we will request your consent again.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.description: For questions about our cookie use:

metadata.title: Privacy Policy | InsuranceClarity India
metadata.description: Privacy Policy for InsuranceClarity India - How we collect, use, and protect your information under DPDP Act 2023.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.description: InsuranceClarity India ("we," "us," or "our") operates insuranceclarity.in in compliance with applicable Indian laws, including:

laws.dpdp: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act)
laws.itRules: IT (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures) Rules, 2011

introduction.closing: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

processingPrinciples.title: 2. Data Processing Principles (DPDP Act Section 6)
processingPrinciples.description: We process personal data based on these legal principles:

items.purposeLimitation: Purpose Limitation: Data collected only for stated purposes (website operation, error monitoring, analytics)
items.dataMinimization: Data Minimization: We collect only what is strictly necessary
items.storageLimitation: Storage Limitation: Data retained per section 8(2) of DPDP Act
items.accuracy: Accuracy: We keep records current where in our control
items.integrityConfidentiality: Integrity and Confidentiality: Technical safeguards via HTTPS, encryption, and access controls

dataCategories.title: 3. Personal Data vs. Sensitive Personal Data (SPD)

personalData.title: 3.1 Personal Data We Collect
personalData.description: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect:

items.deviceBrowser: Device and browser information (type, version, operating system)
items.pagesVisited: Pages visited and time spent on site
items.contactData: Optional contact data (name, email) if you contact us voluntarily

sensitiveData.title: 3.2 Sensitive Personal Data (SPD) - We Actively Avoid
sensitiveData.warningTitle: We have explicit policies not to collect:

items.financialData: Financial data (income, bank details, sum insured)
items.healthData: Health data (medical history, age for underwriting purposes)
items.governmentIds: Aadhaar, PAN, or other government identifiers

sensitiveData.rationaleBody: These are sensitive personal data under DPDP Act section 3(36) and require explicit consent under section 8(3). We do not need them for educational content, so we do not collect them. Calculator inputs (age, sum) are processed locally in your browser and are not transmitted to our servers.

lawfulBasis.title: 4. Lawful Basis for Processing (DPDP Act Section 4)

items.analytics: Analytics (Google Analytics / PostHog): Consent via cookie banner
items.errorMonitoring: Error Monitoring (Sentry): Legitimate interest (website stability) - no PII retained
items.websiteFunctionality: Website Functionality: Lawful processing without specific consent

rights.title: 5. Your Rights Under DPDP Act Section 18-20

know.title: 5.1 Right to Know (Section 18)
know.requestValue: "What personal data do you have about me?"

items.providedValue: Copy of data we process, purpose of processing, recipients (Google, PostHog, Sentry), retention period

correction.title: 5.2 Right to Correction (Section 19)
correction.requestValue: "My data is wrong, please fix it."

items.cannotDeleteValue: Analytics aggregates (already anonymized), legal compliance records

withdrawConsent.title: 5.4 Right to Withdraw Consent
withdrawConsent.description: You can withdraw consent for cookies at any time via:

items.functionalCookiesNote: Note: Some website features may not work without functional cookies

tier2.title: Tier 2: Appeal to Data Protection Board
tier2.description: If we do not respond within 30 days, or if you are dissatisfied with our response:

analyticsBlocking.title: 8.1 Analytics Events - PII Blocking
analyticsBlocking.description: Custom analytics events sent to GA4 and PostHog pass through the same PII blocking layer:

items.demographicFields: dob, date_of_birth, name, full_name, address, income

analyticsBlocking.bucketingValue: Age sent as ranges (18-24, 25-34, etc.), sum insured as ranges (under_10L, 10L-25L, etc.) - not exact values.

items.sensitivePatterns: Block error messages containing SSN, phone, and email patterns

ipAnonymization.title: 8.3 IP Anonymization
ipAnonymization.description: We configure Google Analytics to anonymize the last octet of your IP address (for example, 192.168.1.123 -> 192.168.1.0). This prevents identification of your exact location.

thirdParty.title: 9. Third-Party Services and Data Transfers
thirdParty.description: We use the following third-party services:

ga4.title: Google Analytics 4
ga4.description: Data is transferred to Google's servers per Google's standard Data Processing Agreement. Google acts as processor; we are controller. DPDP Act compliance follows Google's terms.

posthog.title: PostHog
posthog.description: Product analytics is sent to PostHog only when it is configured and you have opted into analytics cookies. We disable session recording and rely on the same client-side PII blocking rules used for other analytics events.

sentry.title: Sentry (Error Monitoring)
sentry.description: Data is transferred to Sentry servers. No SPD is transferred; only sanitized error logs. Sentry acts as processor; we are controller.

cookies.title: 10. Cookies
cookies.descriptionPrefix: Our website uses cookies for analytics and functionality. For detailed information, please see our

items.encryption: Encryption: HTTPS (TLS 1.3+) for all data in transit
items.piiRedaction: PII Redaction: Sensitive fields blocked from GA4 and Sentry
items.accessControl: Access Control: Limited staff access to analytics dashboards
items.securityHeaders: Security Headers: X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, CSP configured

dnt.title: 11.2 Do Not Track (DNT) Support
dnt.description: We respect your browser's Do Not Track (DNT) signal. If you have DNT enabled, we skip all analytics tracking for your session regardless of your cookie banner choice.

changes.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We will notify you of material changes via an updated Last Modified date on this page and a homepage notice for 30 days.

contact.title: 13. Contact and Data Protection Officer
contact.location: India - InsuranceClarity is an online-only educational platform.

items.informationAggregator: Information aggregator from IRDAI and insurer websites

items.advisePolicyPurchase: Advise you on which policy to buy
items.rankPolicies: Rank policies as best or worst
items.earnFinancialBenefit: Earn any financial benefit from your insurance purchases

items.readPolicy: Read the full policy document from the insurer
items.verifyExclusions: Verify exclusions and terms directly with the insurer
items.consultAdvisor: Consult an IRDAI-licensed advisor before buying
items.askPremiums: Ask the insurer about current premiums (ours are indicative only)

complaints.title: IRDAI Complaints:
complaints.description: If you believe we have violated IRDAI regulations:

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using InsuranceClarity India (the Website), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Website.

provides.educationalContent: Educational content about insurance products in India
provides.informationalTools: Informational tools such as premium calculators and policy comparisons
provides.claimsAndExclusions: General information about insurance claims and exclusions

notProvide.professionalAdvice: Financial, insurance, legal, or tax advice
notProvide.salesServices: Insurance sales, solicitation, or intermediation services

noProfessionalAdvice.title: 3. No Professional Advice
noProfessionalAdvice.description: All content on this Website is for general informational and educational purposes only. It does not constitute professional financial, insurance, legal, or tax advice.
noProfessionalAdvice.beforeDecisionLabel: Before making any insurance decisions, you should:

items.consultAdvisor: Consult with a qualified, IRDAI-licensed insurance advisor
items.readPolicyDocs: Read the complete policy documents from the insurer
items.verifyTerms: Verify all terms, conditions, and exclusions directly with the insurer
items.considerCircumstances: Consider your specific circumstances and needs

accuracy.title: 4. Accuracy of Information
accuracy.description: We strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information. However:

items.productsChange: Insurance products, terms, and premiums change frequently
items.latestOfferings: Information may not reflect the latest insurer offerings
items.estimatesIndicative: Calculator estimates are indicative only and may not match actual premiums
items.comparisonIncomplete: Comparison data is based on publicly available information and may be incomplete

accuracy.disclaimer: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information on this Website.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability (Revised)
liability.notLiableTitle: 5.1 What We Are Not Liable For
liability.notLiableDescription: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we are not liable for:

notLiableItems.indirectDamages: Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including lost profits, lost opportunity, or emotional distress
notLiableItems.directDamages: Direct damages from your use, including insurance purchasing decisions, denied claims, premium changes, or coverage gaps
notLiableItems.thirdPartyConduct: Actions of insurers, payment gateways, or other service providers

liability.claimTitle: 5.2 What We Are Potentially Liable For
liability.claimDescription: You may have a claim against us only if you prove:

claimItems.falseStatement: We made a materially false statement on our website
claimItems.reasonableReliance: You reasonably relied on that statement
claimItems.causation: Our false statement directly caused the loss

capItems.baselineCap: The greater of INR 50,000 (baseline cap) or actual damages proven
capItems.unlimitedIf: Liability is unlimited if we commit gross negligence, willful misconduct, or breach data protection law (DPDP Act)

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: All content on this Website is the property of InsuranceClarity or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. Insurer names, logos, and trademarks belong to their respective owners and are used solely for identification and educational purposes.

items.unlawfulPurpose: Use the Website for any unlawful purpose
items.scrapeCopy: Scrape, copy, or reproduce content without permission
items.unauthorizedAccess: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
items.malware: Transmit malware, viruses, or harmful code

thirdPartyLinks.title: 8. Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.description: This Website may contain links to third-party websites. We do not control these websites and are not responsible for their content, privacy practices, or terms of service.

monetization.title: 9. Monetization and Independence
monetization.currentState: As of the date of these terms, we do not receive commissions, referral fees, or compensation from any insurance company for leads, sales, or placements.
monetization.futureDisclosure: If this changes in the future, we will update this section and clearly disclose any commercial relationships that may affect our content.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification (Mutual)
indemnification.userDescription: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless InsuranceClarity from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your violation of these Terms, misuse of information, or third-party claims related to your conduct.
indemnification.userException: Exception: You are not required to indemnify us if the claim arises from our gross negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of privacy laws.
indemnification.companyDescription: We agree to indemnify and hold harmless you from any third-party claims arising from our violation of intellectual property law or misrepresentation of facts that expose your data.

governingLaw.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.description: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in India.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes are effective upon posting with an updated Last Modified date. Your continued use constitutes acceptance.

consumerProtection.title: 13. Consumer Protection and Grievance Redressal
consumerProtection.rightsTitle: 13.1 Consumer Rights Under Consumer Protection Act, 2019

rightsItems.accurateInfo: Receive accurate, clear information about our service
rightsItems.fileComplaint: File a complaint if you believe this website caused financial loss
rightsItems.seekCompensation: Seek compensation for misleading information (if proven)
rightsItems.timelyResponse: Get a response within the time frames specified below

tier2.title: Tier 2: District Consumer Protection Authority
tier2.description: If you are not satisfied with our response within 30 days, you may escalate to:

items.districtForum: District Consumer Disputes Redressal Forum of your jurisdiction
items.timeLimit: Time limit: Within 2 years from date of issue

tier3.title: Tier 3: State and National Consumer Commission
tier3.description: For claims exceeding INR 1 crore, you may file before the State or National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission.

complaintProcess.title: 13.3 How to File a Complaint
complaintProcess.step1Body: Send a detailed complaint to grievance@insuranceclarity.in including your name, email, phone, date of issue, description of grievance, specific loss suffered (if any), proof (screenshots), and requested remedy.
complaintProcess.step2Body: Within 5 working days, we will send an acknowledgment with a reference number.
complaintProcess.step3Body: Within 30 days, we will send our response with a remediation proposal or dispute explanation.
complaintProcess.step4Body: If dissatisfied, file with your District Consumer Protection Authority.

refundPolicy.title: 13.4 Refund / Service Withdrawal Policy
refundPolicy.description: Since we provide free educational tools, there is no refund policy. If we discontinue a tool, we provide 30 days notice. No payment has been collected, so no refund applies.

unsubscribePage.description: Enter your email address to stop receiving Insurance Clarity emails.

claimSettlementRatio.question: What is Claim Settlement Ratio?
claimSettlementRatio.answer: CSR is the percentage of claims paid vs claims received. Higher is better.

idv.question: What is IDV in motor insurance?
idv.answer: Insured Declared Value is the maximum amount you get in case of total loss or theft.

multipleHealthPolicies.question: Can I have multiple health insurance policies?
multipleHealthPolicies.answer: Yes, you can claim from multiple policies for a single hospitalization.

freeLookPeriod.question: What is the free look period?
freeLookPeriod.answer: 15-30 days during which you can return a policy for full refund if not satisfied.

cta.title: Have More Questions?
cta.description: Contact IRDAI for grievances or the Insurance Ombudsman for dispute resolution.
